cockpit.name: Cockpit
cockpit.description: You are in the cockpit with controls in your hands and see stars outside your viewport.

controlRoom.name: Control Room
controlRoom.description: You are in the control room with the control console in the center with some rooms attached.

livingQuarters.name: Living Quarters
livingQuarters.description: You are in the living quarters with a bed and a desk.

dataPad.name: Data Pad
dataPad.description: A data pad with some information on it.

repairTorch.name: Repair Torch
repairTorch.description: A repair torch used for fixing things.

spaceSuit.name: Space Suit
spaceSuit.description: A space suit used for spacewalks.

laserCutter.name: Laser Cutter
laserCutter.description: A laser cutter used for cutting through metal.

flightManual.name: Flight Manual
flightManual.description: A flight manual with instructions on how to operate the spaceship.

shipDiagnosticTool.name: Ship Diagnostic Tool
shipDiagnosticTool.description: A tool used for diagnosing issues with the spaceship.
